title: Sword Of Flight
description: A small mod that adds new equipment, like a sword with flight abilities, armor that gives you slow falling, helmets that give you night vision, and a huge winding new structure in the end
body:
The Sword Of Flight mod adds all new equipment, like the sword the mod is named after, the Sword Of Flight, the new Slow Falling armor set, a line of spider eye helmets that give you night vision, and a range of new purple blocks with gravity effects.
A picture of everything added in the mod

 

The new Sword Of Flight grants creative flight when held, and launches enemies up into the air when hit. It is crafted with the two new ingots added into the game and a blaze rod,
The recipe for the Sword Of Flight

 

The first new ingot is the Levitation Ingot which gives the sword its ability to launch enemies into the air, crafted with vanilla materials, but also with some of the new levitation blocks,
The recipe for the levitation ingot

 

The second new ingot is the Falling Ingot and grants the sword its abilities of flight, crafted with just vanilla items, but uses an elytra, so you can't craft it without defeating the ender dragon first.
The recipe for the falling ingot

 

The new line of spider eye helmets grant night vision when worn, and are crafted with the new Spider Smithing Template.
The smithing recipe for the spider eye helmets

 

The Spider Eye Smithing template is also not found in chests, instead its crafted with a few vanilla items,
The recipe for the spider eye template

 

The Slow Falling Armor is between diamond and netherite when it comes to stats, but it gives permanent slow falling when the full set is worn, they are quite easy to craft, with the exact same shape as normal armor, but with the new Levitation Amethysts
The recipe for the slow falling armor


The Levitation Amethysts are crafted with normal amethysts and some levitation essence
The recipe for levitation amethysts

 

Finally, the new levitation blocks and essence, are a set of items, starting with levitation essence, dropped from shulkers. Nine levitation essence gives a levitation block. When right clicked in the hotbar, the levitation block gives the levitation effect for 2 seconds, but can be spammed to get to high places. When walked over, the levitation block gives the levitation effect for five seconds, making it useful for redstoneless elevators.
the recipe for the levitation block

 

The levitation block is blasted into the the cracked levitation block, which gives a jump boost effect instead of levitation. The cracked levitation block can only be gotten from blasting, normal smelting will not work.
the smelting recipe for the levitation block

 

The recipe for the levitation brick is similar to the levitation block, except the cracked levitation block is in the middle. The levitation bricks give twice as much just boost as the cracked levitation block, and give a huge speed boost, great for highways, you can even go fast enough that you can walk over gaps.
the recipe for the levitation bricks

 

I will be adding more to this in the future, this is just the first full version I have made, please feel free to tell me about suggestions or problems in the comments and I will to try to address them as soon as i can
